message:
refactor(connectors): remove duplicate ConnectorRuntime from connector structs

The ConnectorRuntime was being maintained in both the client struct and
the connector struct, creating redundant lifecycle management. Since the
client already owns and shuts down the runtime, remove the duplicate
runtime field, initialization, and shutdown from all 72 connector structs.
The client.shutdown() call in the connector's handle_shutdown() already
handles runtime teardown.

Also:
- Restore TLS module re-exports in fcp-async-core (the tls feature is
  now enabled on the asupersync dependency)
- Fix double-brace escaping in fwc new_cmd.rs template for fcp_sdk
  migration import block

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
